description: You are a software engineer who has inherited a partially-built spreadsheet formula engine at ~/PycharmProjects/spreadsheet_engine/. The engine supports cell references, arithmetic, and some built-in functions, but the previous developer left before finishing. Some modules have bugs and three core features — VLOOKUP, COUNTIF, and AVERAGE — are stubbed out. Additionally, the evaluator only handles single-column ranges; multi-column (2D) range evaluation is unimplemented. The test suite has 35 tests across 8 files. Currently only 19 pass. Fix the bugs and complete the stub implementations so that at least 30 of 35 tests pass. Do not modify any files in tests/ or data/.
